title: スプリングSの後に・バクシン成長

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After facing defeat, Sakura Bakushin O is left
stunned. Believing there's a possibility she is not
talented in any capacity, she becomes a mess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I manage to encourage her by saying that more
speed will guarantee victory. My next suggestion
is the Aoi Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Trusting in my words, Sakura Bakushin O is
confident she'll grow through her latest race.
